title: WorkQue_UserData Function
parameters:
WorkQueNum	Integer expression (1 - 16) that specifies the work queue number.

index	Optional.  Integer expression that represents the index of the queue data.  (the first index number is 0)
see_also:
Returns the user data (real value) registered to the specified work queue.

WorkQue_UserData

WorkQue_UserData Function Example

'Remove from queue

angle = WorkQue_UserData(1)  ' default to queue index of 0

Jump WorkQue_Get(1) :U(angle)

WorkQue_Remove 1
examples:
angle = WorkQue_UserData(1)  ' default to queue index of 0
Jump WorkQue_Get(1) :U(angle)
WorkQue_Remove 1
